items.name_en: M25445 Light Green Ostrich. Inspired by Louis Vuitton trunks, this Slim Trunk handbag features ostrich leather with riveted borders and a metal S-lock, showcasing an avant-garde rock style. The glossy chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable, offering various carrying options. 23 x 12 x 4 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M30258 Monogram Black (〽️Grade A Full Steel〽️) Personalized! Brazza Wallet. This Brazza wallet is from Louis Vuitton's earliest men's series—the Taïga leather collection. It is a practical design with multiple pockets, compartments, and dividers. A silver LV initial adds a subtle and elegant brand touch to the design. 10 x 19 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width).

items.name_en: M30271 Monogram! (〽️Grade A Full Steel〽️) COIN Card Holder. This Coin card holder is crafted from Louis Vuitton's iconic black Taïga leather, featuring a sleek and sharp look, making it an ideal choice for safely storing coins and bills. It includes multiple credit card slots and bill compartments, plus a silver zip coin pocket. 8.0x14.5x1.0cm.

items.name_en: M30317 Monogram (〽️Grade A Full Steel〽️) Personalized, chip changeable! Zippy Zipper Vertical Wallet. This Louis Vuitton Zippy vertical zipper wallet is crafted from Monogram Eclipse canvas, offering a stylish and practical design ideal for carrying credit cards and cash. It features a secure all-around zipper construction with multiple card slots, a zip coin pocket, and several bill and receipt compartments. 10 x 20 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M4 Green, M94 Black, M95 Brown, M3 Off-White, M97 Brown. Top-tier original. The exquisite and practical Lock It MM bag features refined Taurillon leather and smooth calfskin, accented with gold-finish buckles and hardware. The iconic House style includes a padlock, key charm, and embossed Louis Vuitton signature. Equipped with a hinged top handle and a detachable strap, this tote offers multiple carrying options.
items.name_cn:
M4 Green, M94 Black, M95 Brown, M3 Off-White, M97 Brown. Top-tier original. The exquisite and practical Lock It MM bag features refined Taurillon leather and smooth calfskin, accented with gold-finish buckles and hardware. The iconic House style includes a padlock, key charm, and embossed Louis Vuitton signature. Equipped with a hinged top handle and a detachable strap, this tote offers multiple carrying options.

(Long x Height x Width)
Black
Taurillon leather, smooth calfskin half-leather decoration, microfiber lining
Gold-finish square buckle padlock, key charm
Exterior pocket

Zippered interior pocket and flat pocket
5 protective metal studs
Strap: Detachable, adjustable
